content: Tantalum-180m has a half-life of approximately 8.152 hours. This metastable state of tantalum-180 decays through isomeric transition to the ground state of tantalum-180.
raw_content: Tantalum-180m has a half-life of approximately 8.152 hours. This metastable state of tantalum-180 decays through isomeric transition to the ground state of tantalum-180.
